prompt: Tight three-quarter view of a finished custom built-in bookcase wall in a quiet home-office library nook. Lower portion: shaker-style cabinet doors painted in deep slate, brushed-bronze cup pulls. Upper portion: open shelves with adjustable pin holes, holding a worn leather-bound stack of books, a brass level, a small carved wooden duck decoy. Shot with 50mm normal lens, single warm tungsten table lamp casting a pool of light across the middle shelf and falling off into the corners — single-work-lamp mood. Walnut floor, oatmeal wool rug edge. Slightly desaturated except for a single brand-red bookbinding spine. Working-contractor catalog feel, NOT HGTV bright, NOT luxury staged. No readable text on book spines, no logos.
